Variables.Name: HelpUsage
Variables.Description: Usage template to show for "ucc help"

Variables.Name: HelpParamNames
Variables.Description: The name of the parameter the commandlet takes

Variables.Name: IsServer
Variables.Description:
Whether to load objects required in server, client, and editor context.  If IsEditor is set to false, then a
	  UGameEngine (or whatever the value of ScriptEngine.Engine.GameEngine is) will be created for the commandlet instead
	  of a UEditorEngine (or ScriptEngine.Engine.EditorEngine), unless the commandlet overrides the CreateCustomEngine method.

Variables.Name: LogToConsole
Variables.Description: Whether to redirect standard log to the console

Variables.Name: ShowErrorCount
Variables.Description: Whether to show standard error and warning count on exit
